---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new rule for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: oleg-putseiko
---

<!--
⚠️ NOTICE:
Before submitting a feature request, please search the existing issues to ensure it hasn't been requested or implemented already.
-->

✨ **Feature description**

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to achieve or add to the project (e.g., "Add a new config for Jest", "Change the strictness of the `no-console` rule in the recommended config"). -->

🎯 **Motivation and use case**

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it useful for `eslint-config-woofmeow` users? -->

💡 **Proposed solution**

<!-- A clear and concise description of how you envision this feature working. If you are proposing adding or changing an ESLint rule, please include the rule name and your suggested configuration snippet below. -->

🔄 **Alternatives considered**

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered (e.g., "Currently, I have to manually override this in my local eslint.config.mjs"). -->

➕ **Helpful Links & Additional context**

<!-- Add any other context about the feature request here. If you are proposing a new rule from a specific plugin, please provide a link to the official rule documentation. -->
